heif.boxes

Class PixelInformationBox

  • java.lang.Object
    • heif.boxes.Box
      • heif.boxes.FullBox
        • heif.boxes.PixelInformationBox

  • public class PixelInformationBox
extends FullBox
    Represents the pixi (Pixel Information Box), which provides bit depth and number of channels for a reconstructed image.

    Specification Reference: ISO/IEC 23008-12:2017 on Page 13.

    API Note: Additional testing is required to validate the reliability and robustness of this implementation.

    Since:
    13 August 2025
    Version:
    1.0
    Author:
    Trevor Maggs

    • Field Detail

      • LOGGER

        private static final logger.LogFactory LOGGER

      • numChannels

        private final int numChannels

      • bitsPerChannel

        private final int[] bitsPerChannel

    • Constructor Detail

      • PixelInformationBox

        public PixelInformationBox(Box box,
                           ByteStreamReader reader)
                    throws java.io.IOException
        Constructs a PixelInformationBox by parsing the specified box header and its content.
        Parameters:
        box - the parent Box containing size and type information
        reader - the reader for parsing box content
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if an I/O error occurs
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if malformed data is encountered

    • Method Detail

      • getNumChannels

        public int getNumChannels()
        Returns the number of image channels described by this box.
        Returns:
        the number of channels

      • getBitsPerChannel

        public int[] getBitsPerChannel()
        Returns a copy of the array of bits per channel.
        Returns:
        bits per channel array

      • logBoxInfo

        public void logBoxInfo()
        Logs the box hierarchy and internal entry data at the debug level.

        It provides a visual representation of the box's HEIF/ISO-BMFF structure. It is intended for tree traversal and file inspection during development and degugging if required.

        Overrides:
        logBoxInfo in class FullBox
